titleStmt.title: SII 23.572: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 572. (A.R. No. 572 of 1907.) Nandalūru, Rajampet Taluk, Cuddapah District Saumyanātha temple—on the 2nd, 3rd and 4th tiers of the south base Kulōttuṅga II year 8: 1139-40 A.D.

summary.p: The inscription begins with the introduction Pūmēvu Tirumagaḷ etc. Portions are built in. This is stated to be the charter of the dēvadāna lands of god Kulōttuṅgaśōḻa-Viṇṇagar-Āḻvār and of the demarcation of the four boundaries of the village Kulōttuṅgaśōḻa-chaturvēdimaṅgalam granted to the Sabhā by the chief Madhurāntaka Pottappichchōḻa Siddharasa. A list of the former is given in which are included wet and dry lands coconut and areca garden, flower garden and deserted land (nattappāḻ) and residential areas. (Of the latter?) the charter confirms 52 share-holders in their possession as sarvanamasya recorded as granted in No. 573 below.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pūmevu tirumakaḷ poṉmārvu puṇara nāmevu kalaimakaḷ nalam peritu ciṟappa vicaiyamāmakaḷ yattiruppa Icaiyiṉ celvi yeṇṭicai viḷaṅka niruparvantiṟaiñca niṇilamaṭantaiyait tiru maṇam puṇarntu cirvaḷartarum maṇimuṭi kavitteṉa maṇimuṭicūṭi mullaiñālattu maṉṉuyirellām Ellaiyiliṉpa miyalpiṉi leyta veṇkuṭai niḻaṟṟac ceṅkolocci vāḻi pullūḻi Āti naṭa
ppac cempoṉ virasiṅhāsanattup puvaṉimuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum viṟ ṟiruntaruḷiya kovirājakesaripaṉmarāṉa cakravattikaḷ śrīkulottuṅka coḻadevaṟku yāṇṭu Eṭṭāvatu Adhirājendramaṇṭalattu meṟpākkai nāṭṭu nirantaṉūr Akara brahmateyam śrīkulottuṅkacoḻac catu rvedimaṅkalattu śrīkulottuṅkacoḻa viṇṇakarāḻvār tevatāṉaṅ kaḷukku śāsanamum Ivvūr sabhaiyār nāṟpāl Ellaiyum peṟṟuṭai maikku śāsanamum . svasti caraṇa saroruha
vihitavilocana sulocana yaṇa simha kāñcīpura trisuramaheśvara śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaleśvaran madhurāntakap pottappiccoḻa siddharasaṉeṉ kalveṭṭik kuṭuttapaṭi taṅkaḷ Akarattukku nāṟpāl Ellaiyāvatu kiḷikkūṭṭu malaikku meṟku kuṇṭalūr Ellaikku vaṭakku māṭṭurel laikkuk kiḻakku vaṭakku nirantaṉūrellaiyakappaṭṭa Innāṟpāṟ kel laikku naṭuvuḷḷa nilattil Ivvāḻvār tevatāṉam dā
nañcai mpikkuṟupaṭṭiyum puñcai Eri Uḷḷil nilam ṉā patu paṭṭiyum An=tarigaṅgaivāykkālukkut teṟkku Araikkāl kūṟṟāl coṭṭappaṭṭi Oṉṟum Āṟṟukkuppokum peruvaḻikku meṟkku viraviccātiran teṅkamtoṭṭam paṭṭi Oṉṟum janavallabhan tiruvattacāmappūṭṭai brāhmaṇar teṅkam kollaikaḷḷukkuk kiḻakku
kiḻakkunokki pona vatikku vaṭakkuc cūḷaimeṭakappaṭa brāhmaṇar nilaṅkaḷu ṟa Uḷḷa nilamum tirunandavanaṅkaḷ teṉṉaraṅkaṉ perun=tevik kamukat toṭṭamum vattakula nārāyaṇan tirunandanavanamāna periya kamuka (muka) n=toṭṭamu mitukku meṟkku muṉpu brāhmaṇarirun=tu Āḻvāṟkkut tan=tu pona nattapparamum rājanārāyaṇan tirunandana vana(vana)mu mitukkut teṟkkil vaḻikkut teṟku kuṭiyiruppāna nattattil
lakoṇṭāṉ tirunantavanamum maṭuvukkuk kiḻakkil malaiyaṭik ka muka toṭṭamum toṭṭappā Ūṟkku meṟkku teṟkkunokki pona peruvaḻikkuk kiḻakkum ṭakku meṟkku
kilvatikku meṟku teruvumuṭiya Uḷḷa maṉaikaḷum teṟkil koyil viṇṇappañ ceyvārkaḷ maṉaioṉṟum Ivai devar kaḷukku Iṟṟaikku m muṉpu tāṅka
kkiya kiṇaṟum Ikkāṭu koṭu Eriyuṅ karaiyum Etirvāyuṅ kuḻiyuṅ kuṭṭaiyum nattaṅkaḷum Uḷḷatellām Akappaṭa Iv vāḻvāṟkku te ḷḷu tellā
cirināḷ Ippotu bhāgaṅka ḷanubhavittuvarukiṟa Aimpattiru vaṟkum Aṣṭabhogasvāmyam sarvanamasyamāka
ceyyakkaṭavitākavum Ivvūrk korunāḷum Ugrāṇam pa kaṭavatākavum Ivvūril cevaka pokam peṟātārākavum tār ko
kumariyiṭai Āyiraṅkurāl pacukkoṉṟāṉ pāvattilp povār . svadattām paradattām vā yo hareta vasu
viṣaiyaceṉāpati yāḻvāṉ piramāṇam yeḻutiṉamaikku Eti teci raṭṭakuṭi Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 23.572 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
